name: public_safety_port_security_scanner_flags_redwood_st_lt
premise: A school threat assessment model surfaced a student’s mental-health crisis notes to patrol without counselor review. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety port security scanner flags redwood st lt has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ravi Okoye
agents.identity: I am Ravi Okoye, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Harper Haddad
agents.identity: I am Harper Haddad, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with long term.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to long term to preserve operational short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Ravi Okoye must choose under short term versus long term. What does Ravi Okoye do?
